title: Didymoglossum intramarginale
taxonomy: Didymoglossum intramarginale is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Didymoglossum, which is part of the Hymenophyllaceae family. Didymoglossum intramarginale is a type of filmy fern, characterized by its delicate and small fronds. The species is native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. Within the Hymenophyllaceae family, Didymoglossum intramarginale is classified as a member of the Hymenophyllales order.
